reference_examples.raw_sql:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='acquisition', tags=['acquisition', 'daily']) }}

WITH google AS (
  SELECT 'google' AS channel, ...
),
meta AS (
  SELECT 'meta' AS channel, ...
),
unioned AS (
  SELECT * FROM google
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM meta
  UNION ALL ...
)
SELECT
  {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['channel','date','country']) }} AS md5_key,
  *
FROM unioned
reference_examples.compiled_sql: CREATE TABLE ... AS WITH google AS ( SELECT 'google' AS channel, ... )
reference_examples.schema_yml:
models:
  - name: marketing_spend_day_country_agg
    columns:
      - name: md5_key
        tests: [unique, not_null]

reference_examples.raw_sql:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='acquisition', tags=['acquisition', 'daily']) }}

SELECT
  date,
  channel,
  SUM(spend_usd) AS spend_usd,
  SUM(clicks) AS clicks,
  SUM(impressions) AS impressions
FROM {{ ref('marketing_spend_day_country_agg') }}
GROUP BY 1, 2
reference_examples.compiled_sql: SELECT date, channel, SUM(spend_usd)... FROM DW.ACQUISITION.MARKETING_SPEND_DAY_COUNTRY_AGG GROUP BY 1,2

decision_log.decision: Read marketing_spend pipeline as reference — multi_source_union pattern with UNION ALL
decision_log.rationale: Best match for adding a new channel source to existing multi-channel pipeline
